title: bidens leptoglossa
intro: Bidens leptoglossa, also known as Beggar's ticks, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the aster family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Bidens leptoglossa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Bidens leptoglossa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
